title: Natural Disasters!
description: This mod adds 9 different natural disasters to your Minecraft world and they actually spawn naturally if you wish to!
body:
Welcome to my mod called...


![Natural disasters mod title image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7f4006358832d5a1e3d8306e11b667a44a2e3af4.png)



About

THIS IS NOT AN OFFICIAL MINECRAFT MOD, I'M A YOUTUBER THAT WANTED TO MAKE THIS In this mod there are 9 natural disasters you can spawn in and they are very destructive! They can also spawn naturally If you enable it making them natural!

Images below!!!



⚡ List of disasters! ⚡

- Tornados! - Rips blocks from the ground and throws them everywhere.

- Meteor showers! - Spawns pretty high in the sky and rips blovks up and a meteorite remains.

- Tsunamis! - Massive waves ready to submerge anything in it's path.

- Wildfires! - Any available block within a zone gets lit on fire.

- Meteors! (a single meteor) - Does the same as the meteor shower but there's just one.

- Acidrain! - Poisons every entity within the zone it's raining and it has loads of acid particles.

- Sandstorms! - Spawns sand flying everywhere with loads of particles.

- Sinkholes! - Makes a hole.

- Eathquakes! - Rips through the ground in a diagonal line.

Tornado!

![Tornado image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/48d197d636cc9fbdcad186c9c8f1af6e48559eba.webp)

![Sandstorm image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e660135eacb6ef96751640481c8d3cc0b4a3ce32.webp)

The disaster menu

![The disaster menu image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1565f76a4cf0fbc8c9cae2efe99f871a6bc94716_0.webp)

The disaster detector!



The disaster detector will scan for any nearby disasters, if it detects one it will show a message on screen saying what disaster is incoming. It will also play a beeping sound when it finds a disaster but if it's a tornado it will play a tornado siren sound!

Crafting recipe



Spoiler

A ruined house can also naturally generate!

![A ruined house image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7ca6f3b76ef05b3c8129ebf7bf89a80845d278cf.webp)


Fixes compared to version 1

- No more server overloading when using the tornado and meteor shower. - Acid rain actually works now. - The disaster menu is aligned better. - The tornado is more effiecent when throwing blocks from the ground. - When spawning the tornado naturally and in the disasters menu, it always spawns at world surface height. - The wildfire is better, its able to work properly and it can place more fire. - I don't know if I have forgotten anything I have literally fixed and updated SO much stuff!

Credits!



Credits to NWT on mcreator, (they have a youtube channel) and this helped me activate stuff in a certain distance at the tornado and for the nbt timer, I used a lot of timers! nbt timer: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gTbWiMu-M-0
Credits to https://online-audio-converter.com/ for allowing me to conert the Uppbeat sounds into the .ogg format
Sound effects from Uppbeat: tornado siren jam fx
seaside ambience waves crashing on beach vincentmets
wind blowing through window GFX sounds
wind howling creepily jam FX
thunderstorm incoming GFX sounds
thunder rumbling gamemaster audio
acid dripping hissing Joshua chivers (can't find on Uppbeat? type acid and it should be their as Jochi SFX) also I trimmed the sound a bit
warning buzzer the foundation

Wanna support me?

I'd really appreciate if you shared this modpage with someone of even checked out my youtube channel! I'm currently trying to build a community and everyone is welcomed!



Also, I'd appreciate if you went on over to [RetroMan Animations Mods](https://modrinth.com/user/RetroMan-Animations-Mods) since they have great mods to!

Stuff to know


I haven't tested the mod on servers or anything so I'd appreciate if you let me know if the mod works on servers or the client.

License


The license I chose was the ARR license but I will give you some permissons! :D - You can use my mod in your videos but you MUST give credits to me. - Your videos can be monitized. - Any further questions? Feel free to ask (on youtube) and maybe I'll add some answers here! :D I'm aware of my old natural disasters mod on mcreator from the account blueheartcreations so don't panic, I'm not the fake and the other account is not the fake! I have the original files to continue this mod on the mcreator app that's how I made the second version.
